# MDE 1.4.16

## Features

- Added the production MDE desktop app icon based on the confirmed `02 Split Editor` design direction.
- Committed reusable icon assets for Electron packaging: `build/icon.svg`, `build/icon.png`, `build/icon.icns`, and `build/icon.ico`.
- Configured Electron Builder to use the new icon for macOS app, DMG/ZIP, and Windows NSIS packaging.

## Bug Fixes

- None.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added a reproducible `npm run icons:generate` workflow that regenerates platform icon assets from the selected SVG master.
- Added integration coverage for icon asset existence, PNG dimensions, ICNS structure, ICO image sizes, and Electron Builder icon paths.
- Preserved the app icon design exploration assets under `docs/superpowers/prototypes/`.

## Documentation

- Added the completed app icon requirement and design references.
- User manual was not changed because the app icon update affects packaged application identity, not in-app workflows, settings, search, links, workspace handling, update behavior, or troubleshooting guidance.

## Verification

- `npm run icons:generate`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run package`
- Verified the packaged macOS app points to `icon.icns` and the packaged icon matches `build/icon.icns`.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP builds for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
- Windows NSIS installer and updater metadata.
